items.title: 📡 No more daily update prompts — and zero telemetry
items.body: The anonymous daily user counter is gone completely. It turned out the way it recorded its numbers made SillyTavern show you an 'update available' for DES every single day — that was never the intent, and we're sorry for the noise. The whole feature has been removed: DES now sends nothing anywhere, ever, and you'll only see an update when there's an actual update.

items.title: 💭 Character thoughts stay put
items.body: The little thought dropdowns under a message could disappear on every new reply, only coming back if you switched the option off and on again. They now survive each message properly, on swipes too — and if you had someone's thoughts expanded, they stay expanded.

items.title: 📱 The keyboard stays down on mobile
items.body: Two spots in the Character Workshop popped the phone keyboard open when you didn't want to type: resetting the injection prompt, and opening the lorebook dropdown (which then hid the very list you were trying to read). Both are fixed — the keyboard only appears when you actually tap into a text box.
